lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.CfnA: Specifies an Amazon S3 bucket for logging audio conversations

lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.KmsK.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key for encrypting audio log files stored in an Amazon S3 bucket.

lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.LogP.Description: The S3 prefix to assign to audio log files.

lex.botalias.s3bucketlogdestination.S3Bu.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an Amazon S3 bucket where audio log files are stored.
